---
title: "A Quartic Cover of 37a1 and Its Regular S4-Closure"
subtitle: "Arithmetic geometry"
date: 2026-04-07
categories: [gen2, arithmetic, submitted]
journal: "Journal of Number Theory"
status: "Submitted"
repo: "the-omega-institute/branch-cubic-regular-s4-closure-prym-ray-class"
theorems: 39
featured: false
description: "For the conductor-37 elliptic curve, we carry out a complete explicit programme: constructing the regular S4-closure of a degree-4 map, decomposing the Jacobian via rational idempotents into a genus-2..."
---

## Abstract

For the conductor-37 elliptic curve, we carry out a complete explicit programme: constructing the regular S4-closure of a degree-4 map, decomposing the Jacobian via rational idempotents into a genus-2 Jacobian, a resolvent elliptic curve, and a Prym threefold.

**Keywords:** elliptic curves, Galois covers, Jacobian decomposition, Prym varieties, ray class fields

## Key Metrics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Machine-verified theorems | 39 |
| Target journal | Journal of Number Theory |
| Status | Submitted |
| Scope | Arithmetic geometry |

## Video Explainer

*Video coming soon --- NotebookLM pipeline ready, YouTube upload pending.*

## Links

- [Full Paper (GitHub)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/branch-cubic-regular-s4-closure-prym-ray-class)
- [Lean 4 Proofs](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath/tree/dev-automation-integration/lean4)
- [Automath Engine](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath)
